ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member within the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member joined the team */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member left the team (if applicable) */,
  "contribution_level" TEXT /* Level of contribution by the member (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle */,
  "puzzle_description" TEXT /* Description of the puzzle */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the puzzle (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the puzzle (e.g., logic, math, cryptography) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the puzzle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the puzzle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the round in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the round was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_puzzles" (
  "round_puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round-puzzle association */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the puzzle in the round */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for solving the puzzle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_round_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team attempt */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the attempt */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the attempt */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attempt (e.g., in_progress, completed, failed) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the team in the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attempt was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attempt was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_round_attempts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_round_attempts_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_puzzle_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-puzzle attempt */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "unlock_time" TEXT /* Time the puzzle was unlocked */,
  "solve_time" TEXT /* Time the puzzle was solved */,
  "time_to_solve" TEXT /* Time taken to solve the puzzle */,
  "incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect guesses */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attempt (e.g., in_progress, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attempt was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attempt was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_puzzle_attempts_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_puzzle_attempts_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_puzzle_attempts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_hints" (
  "hint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hint */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "hint_text" TEXT /* Text of the hint */,
  "unlock_time" TEXT /* Unlock time for the hint */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the hint in points */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_puzzle_hints" (
  "hint_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hint access */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "hint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hint */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the hint was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hint access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hint access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hint_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_puzzle_hints_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_puzzle_hints_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_puzzle_hints_hint_id FOREIGN KEY ("hint_id") REFERENCES puzzle_hints ("hint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_puzzle_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team-puzzle attempt */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time the submission was made */,
  "submission_text" TEXT /* Text of the submission */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission is correct */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_puzzle_submissions_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("attempt_id") REFERENCES team_puzzle_attempts ("attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "unassigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was unassigned (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "inviter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the invitation */,
  "invitee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the invitation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invitation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invitation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_invitations_inviter_id FOREIGN KEY ("inviter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_invitations_invitee_id FOREIGN KEY ("invitee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_invitations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Time the message was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_messages_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_feedback_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_feedback_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the team in the round */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., time_to_solve, incorrect_guesses) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
